text.tspan: u2022 Service Template scaffolds the project structure
u2022 The scaffolded project depends on the Chassis library
u2022 Cross-cutting changes (e.g. new metric) ship via chassis upgrade
u2022 Structural changes (e.g. CI config) ship via template re-scaffold or sync tool
Templates: Spring Initializr, Yeoman generators, Cookiecutter,
GitHub repo templates, Backstage software templates
Chassis: Spring Boot starters, Micronaut, Quarkus, Dropwizard,
GENERATES: A repo, files, CI pipeline,
UPDATES: Manual u2014 each new service has its own copy
baked once, eaten by one service
graceful shutdown u2014 LIVE at runtime
UPDATES: Bump version u2192 every service
ANALOGY: A car chassis u2014 underlying
